title: sterculia arborea
intro: Sterculia arborea is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, native to tropical Asia and commonly known as the Indian copal tree or sterculia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can help to treat wounds, fever, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Sterculia arborea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, are often used to treat various health conditions, including diarrhea, dysentery, and skin infections.
